questions.question: What precondition must hold for converging two pointers (lo/hi) to be applicable to a pair-sum problem?
What is the formula for computing range sum(l, r) using a prefix sum array?
In a variable sliding window, when do you shrink the left pointer?
questions.answer: When the window violates the constraint (e.g. too many distinct characters, sum too large)

questions.question: What value should `prefix[0]` be set to, and why?
questions.answer: 0 — it represents the sum of an empty prefix, enabling range queries starting at index 0

questions.question: What is the time and space complexity of the fixed sliding window maximum sum algorithm?
